steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: A singular noun phrase—”the International Criminal Police Organization (Interpol)”—precedes the blank, and a noun phrase object follows it. This is a Subject-Verb-Object structure that requires a main verb.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
Subject-verb agreement requires a singular subject to take a singular verb form. “Oversees” is the third-person singular present tense verb that matches “Interpol.” The other three options offer non-finite verb forms (infinitive, gerund, past participle) that cannot function as a main verb.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
